commit.message:
fix(backtest): バックテスト専用プロンプトをスキップ優先に改善

- 「必ず1頭選べ」「スキップ禁止」を削除し、スキップ優先に変更
- STEP1でスキップ条件(A〜D)を明示的にチェックするロジックに変更
- 混戦(1番人気3.0倍超)/大荒れリスク(16頭超)/1番人気不振(複勝率30%以下)/人気情報なしを必ずスキップ
- 条件番号を英字(A/B/C/D)に変更しAIが馬番と混同しないよう修正
- systemPromptもスキップ優先の競馬アナリスト役割に変更
- 回収率100%超を目指し「勝てるレースにだけ賭ける」戦略を徹底

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Apply security and reliability fixes from code review

- Fix command injection in getGitAuthor: replace execSync shell string with spawnSync args array
- Replace hand-rolled YAML frontmatter parser with js-yaml
- Sanitize marked HTML output with sanitize-html at build time
- Add DOMPurify in viewer for defense-in-depth XSS protection
- Add try/catch around fetch with user-facing error message
- Add explicit permissions: contents: write to deploy workflow
- Skip puppeteer install in CI via npm ci --omit=optional
- Move puppeteer to optionalDependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(aether): same-IP verify fallthrough and backend dispose-before-check

Frontend: when verifyLink() fails transiently but scan() finds the bridge
at the same IP, re-verify instead of falling through to clearLink().

Backend: capture Task.Status before Dispose() to avoid reading disposed
object state; add 5-minute in-memory discovery cache to reduce redundant
bridge scanning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 관리자 패널 + 공지사항 시스템 구현

관리자 패널 (/admin, yaya01234@naver.com 단일 지정):
- 대시보드: 총 사용자/매장, 오늘 활성, 주간 신규
- 온보딩 퍼널: 가입→온보딩→매장→첫마감→7일활성
- 기능별 사용률: 마감/영수증/리뷰/발주/브리핑 채택률
- 이탈 위험: 3일 이상 마감 미입력 매장 감지
- 사용자 검색: 이메일 검색→매장 상세→데이터 조회
- 삭제 데이터 복원: soft delete 레코드 원클릭 복원
- 공지사항 CRUD: 생성/활성화 토글/삭제

공지사항 (사용자 대상):
- 홈 화면 상단 배너 (info/warning/update/maintenance 4종)
- 링크 연결 가능, 사용자별 dismiss (localStorage)
- sb_notices 테이블 SQL 마이그레이션 포함

보안:
- 미들웨어 admin 경로 보호 (이메일 체크)
- API routes 관리자 인증 (verifyAdmin)
- Service Role Key로 RLS 우회 (서버 전용)

commit.message:
fix: celebration music cut off by barrier tap leaking past GestureDetector

Taps in empty areas of the celebration overlay leaked through to the
dialog barrier (barrierDismissible: true + deferToChild hit testing),
dismissing the dialog and killing the music mid-playback. Fixed by
setting barrierDismissible: false and HitTestBehavior.opaque so all
taps route through _dismiss() for graceful exit. Also added missing
_chiptune.stop() in XpBadgeCelebration.dispose() as a safety net.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: major Tensegrity table restructure per Patrick's review

- Replace 'Connective Tissue' dimension with 'Balance' (proprioception,
  single-leg, vestibular) — CT already captured by ROM/LRL/SI dimensions
- Rugby: Balance 6, Ice Hockey Balance 9 (skating), Golf SI 6
- Rope Flow: Structural Integration 9, Catapult 6 (nothing quite like it)
- Weck Method: ROM 7, LRL 6, SI 9 all increased
- Hopping: Multi-Directional 6 (should be done multi-directionally)
- Leg Swinging: SI 6, Upper Body 4 (body moves with it)
- Arm Circles: Catapult 5 (elastic upper body quality)
- Floor Living: Upper Body 3
- Shoulder Stand: Upper Body 7
- Balance Board: Balance 10 (that's its entire purpose)
- Gym split into 5 subcategories: Machine Weights / Free Weights /
  ATG Long-Range / Olympic-Ballistic Lifts / Powerlifting
- 'Hams Training' renamed 'Hands Training' (completely different exercise)
  re-rated as hand tension / upper body neural work
- 'Extension Stretches' renamed 'Spinal Extension / Backbend Mobility'
  (Patrick to confirm name)
- Labour split: Gardening / Bricklaying / Chopping Wood / Manual Labour
- Skipping Rope: ankle activation note added
- Rope Flow: weighted rope note added for Multi-Load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: icp-identifier
repository.description: AI-powered Ideal Customer Profile identifier with company intelligence pipeline

commit.message:
Add one-liner installer scripts for macOS, Linux and Windows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Pass delete PG regression test (6th of ~230), clean up code

Enable the `delete` regression test by implementing:
- SERIAL type (auto-incrementing INT4) in parser + catalog
- Partial INSERT (column lists) with default/serial fill
- Function calls (repeat()) in parser + executor expressions
- CompoundIdentifier (alias.column) in parser
- In-memory TOAST store for oversized text values (>8KB pages)
- DELETE alias conflict detection with PG-style error + HINT
- char_length column name mapping from DataFusion

Code quality fixes from review:
- Fix substring-matching bug in find_where_table_ref_pos (use find_bare_in_range)
- Fix fragile string-split in convert_delete (extract name from AST directly)
- Remove dead toast_resolve method
- Return proper error for unknown INSERT columns (was silent usize::MAX)
- Move imports to top of catalog/mod.rs
- Extract estimate_tuple_size helper (was duplicated in toast_if_needed)
- Simplify expr_to_datum FunctionCall via eval_expr reuse
- Move index lookup outside per-row INSERT loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CPU freq lock: use FileWriter to write sysfs directly (no su)

All su-based write approaches failed (su -c redirect, tee, interactive
stdin). Now uses Java FileWriter to write scaling_min_freq directly,
which works when SELinux is permissive (setenforce 0). Reads also use
direct File access. Unlock restores original min_freq the same way.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Escalatie-detectie: backend detecteert naam+email automatisch

- Niet meer afhankelijk van Nina's [[ESCALATIE]] tag (onbetrouwbaar)
- Backend checkt: bevat gebruikersbericht een e-mailadres EN herhaalt
  Nina dat e-mailadres in haar bevestiging? → escalatie naar Help Scout
- Naam wordt slim geëxtraheerd uit gebruikersbericht of Nina's bevestiging
- Samenvatting = eerste vraag van de bezoeker
- Instructie vereenvoudigd: Nina hoeft alleen e-mail te herhalen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CPU freq lock: use single interactive su session for sysfs writes

su -c "echo X > /path" does not work because > is not interpreted.
Now opens one interactive su process, writes all 8 core echo commands
to stdin, then exits. Same approach for unlock/restore. Read operations
still use suExec (cat works fine via su -c).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor(www): move 3D tilt from page-shell to individual elements

Instead of tilting the entire page, apply per-element tilt to hero h1,
terminal blocks, specimen frame, and proof verdict. Each element has
a different --tilt-strength multiplier for depth hierarchy. Surrounding
text and layout stays flat, making tilting elements feel like physical
objects floating above the page.

commit.message:
fix(i18n): translate Threads as 话题 instead of 对话 (#193)

Thread in HXA context is a topic-based discussion unit with status
and multiple participants, closer to 话题 (topic) than 对话
(conversation). This aligns with Slack's Chinese localization.

Changes in zh.json:
- sidebar.threads: 对话 → 话题
- All thread.* keys: 对话 → 话题 (14 occurrences)
- dm.empty: 暂无对话 → 暂无私信 (was incorrectly using thread term)

commit.message:
feat: full-stack i18n for web-next dashboard (en/zh) (#192)

* feat: add full-stack i18n support for web-next dashboard (en/zh)

Implements client-side i18n using React Context with cookie-based
locale persistence. Supports English and Chinese with instant
language switching via LanguageSwitcher in the Header.

- Add i18n infrastructure: LocaleProvider, useTranslations hook,
  locale detection (cookie → navigator → 'en')
- Add messages/en.json and messages/zh.json (~200 keys each)
- Migrate all 13 component files to use translation keys
- Add FOUC prevention script in layout head
- LanguageSwitcher toggles locale and sets NEXT_LOCALE cookie
- Cross-app cookie sharing with hxa-connect-web (same domain)

Closes #34

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #192 review feedback — FOUC prevention, TS version, security

- Gate rendering on `ready` in LocaleProvider to prevent initial flash of
  raw translation keys (P1-1)
- Keep old messages visible during locale switch instead of clearing them
- Fix TypeScript version from nonexistent 5.9.3 to ^5.8.0 (P1-2)
- Add `secure` flag to NEXT_LOCALE cookie
- Add SSR guard to setLocaleCookie for defensive consistency
- Remove unused common.cancel/loading/copied translation keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: translate thread status filter options (en/zh)

The status filter dropdown (All Statuses, Active, Blocked, etc.) was
hardcoded in English. Convert THREAD_STATUS_OPTIONS labels to i18n keys
and translate at render time in ThreadList and OrgAdmin views.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: translate remaining hardcoded English strings for i18n

- Thread status badges now use i18n keys (active→活跃, blocked→已屏蔽, etc.)
  in ThreadList, ThreadHeader, ThreadView, and org admin StatusBadge
- Thread status dropdown transitions translated in ThreadHeader
- Org admin StatusBadge uses admin.orgStatus.* keys
- Admin CopyableCode "Copy"/"Copied" tooltip translated
- MentionPopup "@all — notify everyone" translated
- Org timeAgo helper converted to useTimeAgo hook with i18n
- Thread readOnly banner now shows translated status name

Fixes review comments on PR #192.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: translate all remaining hardcoded English strings

Full i18n audit — fixed every remaining hardcoded user-facing string:

- formatTime() "Yesterday" → accepts t() param, all 7 callers updated
- Header LanguageSwitcher tooltip "Switch to Chinese/English" → i18n keys
- DMList "New channel" placeholder → dm.newChannel key
- DmBubble timestamp now uses translated formatTime

New i18n keys (both en.json and zh.json):
- header.langSwitch.titleZh/titleEn
- dm.newChannel
- time.yesterday (昨天)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Performance: zombie reap, _tw cache, binary truncation, 20fps idle

- SIGCHLD=SIG_IGN auto-reaps daemon child processes (no more zombies)
- _tw() results cached class-wide — font metric calls cut ~10x per frame
- _fit() uses binary search truncation — O(log n) vs O(n) per row
- Idle sleep 0.016/0.033 → 0.05 (20fps) reduces GUI CPU ~60%
- Input handling path unchanged — button response still immediate

perf(vote): progressive image preloading + compress overlays

- NameForm overlays (blocking, 928 Ko instead of 7.6 Mo)
- Avatar layers (background, on NameForm display)
- Vote images (background, on AvatarStep display)

Loading screen shown if user advances before preload completes.
Resize overlays from 1440x3200 to max 2000px + webp q80 (-74%).
Add background-color fallback to prevent white flash.

commit.message:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Severity を 5 段階 (critical/high/medium/low/info) に細分化する

- src/rules/types.ts: Severity 型を 'critical'|'high'|'medium'|'low'|'info' に更新
- 各ルールの severity を重大度に応じて再マッピング
  - high: HE1001/1002/1004/2001/2004/3003 (旧 error)
  - medium: HE1005/2002/3001/3002 (旧 warning のセキュリティ・運用影響系)
  - low: HE1003/1007/2003/2005/2007 (旧 warning のベストプラクティス系)
  - info: 変更なし
- formatter/tty.ts: カラーリングとサマリ表示を 5 段階対応に更新
- formatter/json.ts: summary フィールドを 5 段階対応に更新
- formatter/sarif.ts: SEVERITY_MAP を 5 段階対応に更新
- テスト: 全 severity アサーションを新しい値に更新

Closes #1
